rulings.Case Title: VY NGUYEN ET AL VS. JANET KRAHLING ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Good Faith Settlement Determination
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2024 line 1. CROSS COMPLAINANT THE MILLENNIUM TOWER ASSOCIATION, A CALIFORNIA NONPROFIT MUTUAL BENEFIT CORPORATION NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR GOOD FAITH SETTLEMENT DETERMINATION is DENIED. Moving party failed to show that there was a settlement of any joint torts alleged in this case, let alone that the tort claims (not addressed in the settlement) asserted in this action (filed on November 4, 2021; with prior action filed on March 16, 2018) were settled in good faith between two plaintiffs in CGC-16-553758 (filed on August 17, 2016). See Exhibit B to Hansen declaration. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: LAN LE VS. PATRICK DOMINGO ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Attorneys' Fees; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for November 7, 2024 line 6. DEFENDANT PATRICK DOMINGO, KIRSTEN DOMINGO NOTICE OF MOTION FOR ATTORNEYS' FEES; MEMORANDUM OF POINTS AND AUTHORITIES IN SUPPORT THEREOF is continued to December 17, 2024 for Defendants to file a supplemental brief, not to exceed 2 pages, addressing the timeliness of the Motion for Attorney's fees. While CRC 3.1702 is listed in the Notice of Motion, it is not addressed in the Points and Authorities. Supplemental brief shall be filed and served no later than December 6, 2024. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (669) 254-5252; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
